title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run interface.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; pip-installable.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that lets you use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; supports generate, chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Interactive TUI for chatting with Ollama models written in Go.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Neovim plugin that turns Ollama into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension to chat with local Ollama models inside the editor sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; use local models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node that adds Ollama chat & generate actions to no-code workflows.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that need to spin up Ollama and run model tests.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama with async IEnumerables.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed APIs and streaming support for Ollama.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client for Ollama with async http implementation.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Unofficial Dart/Flutter package to integrate Ollama into mobile/desktop apps.

title: ollama-php
summary: Community PHP SDK for Ollama with Laravel service provider.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using any local Ollama model.
